title: Casper (PvP Client)
description:
A lunar/badlion client alternative for people who want an overall better experience in-game for 1.8.9 while using the Modrinth launcher 

(Modrinth Supremacy)
body:
A very simple and lightweight PvP focused minecraft client for 1.8.9.



Features:

- Improved FPS

- Smoother ingame experience

- Pre-installed pvp focused mods with customizations (huds, togglesprint e.t.c)

- Free cosmetics/capes

- Useful Hypixel/PvP quality of life features

and more.... try it out.
